title: Regoli dwar Authorisation for Preparation and Dispensing of Medicinal Products by Automated Means from Designated Premises at Central Procurement Services Unit (CPSU)

provisions.content:
AUTHORISATION FOR PREPARATION AND DISPENSING
OF MEDICINAL PRODUCTS BY AUTOMATED MEANS
FROM DESIGNATED PREMISES AT CENTRAL
PROCUREMENT AND SUPPLIES UNIT (CPSU)

[ L.S. 458.62

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 458.62
REGOLI DWAR AUTHORISATION FOR
PREPARATION AND DISPENSING OF MEDICINAL
PRODUCTS BY AUTOMATED MEANS FROM
DESIGNATED PREMISES AT CENTRAL
PROCUREMENT AND SUPPLIES UNIT (CPSU)
24 ta’ Diċembru, 2021

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 501 tal-2021.
Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-Ingliż biss.
